page_metadata.biotools__summary: ODC-TBI is a Open Data Commons for Preclinical Traumatic Brain Injury Research. The ODC-TBI accelerates progress in pre-clinical TBI research through sharing and re-using data generated by the ODC-TBI community, and promoting transparency, rigor.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ODC-TBI is a Open Data Commons for Preclinical Traumatic Brain Injury Research. The ODC-TBI accelerates progress in pre-clinical TBI research through sharing and re-using data generated by the ODC-TBI community, and promoting transparency, rigor.
